productDisplayName: Flying Machine Men Washed Blue Jeans
description: CompositionBlue jeans with a washed and heavily  distressed look, made of 100% cotton, has two insert pockets on the front with brand logo embroidered above the left pocket and double right pockets on the front,  two patch pockets on the back with embroidered detailing, brand name appliqued on the waist at the back, looped waistband, frayed look with a patch on the right leg, embroidered lettering on the inseam, and a metal zipper and button closure on the frontFitMid rise Slim fitWash careWash and dry separatelyWash inside out in mild detergentDo not iron to retain the creasing effectDry under shadeLook cool and casual in these heavily distressed washed blue jeans from flying machine. The washed and frayed look with the printed patch gives you an individual style, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team it with tees and canvas shoes.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers of length 42"  Height: 6', Waist: 32"
